name: Classic Pancakes
instructions: In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, salt and sugar
Make a well in the center and pour in the milk, egg and melted butter
Mix until smooth
Heat a lightly oiled griddle or frying pan over medium high heat
Pour or scoop the batter onto the griddle, using approximately 1/4 cup for each pancake
Brown on both sides and serve hot

name: Avocado Toast
instructions: Toast the bread slices until golden brown
Mash the avocado in a bowl with lemon juice, salt, and pepper
Spread the avocado mixture evenly on the toasted bread
Sprinkle with red pepper flakes if desired
Top with a fried or poached egg if desired

name: Berry Smoothie Bowl
instructions: Add frozen berries, banana, yogurt, milk, and honey to a blender
Blend until smooth and thick
Pour into a bowl
Top with granola, fresh berries, and chia seeds
Serve immediately

name: Eggs Benedict
instructions: Prepare hollandaise sauce by whisking egg yolks and lemon juice in a double boiler
Slowly add melted butter while whisking constantly
Season with cayenne and salt, keep warm
Poach eggs in simmering water with vinegar
Toast English muffins and warm Canadian bacon
Place bacon on muffins, top with poached eggs
Drizzle hollandaise sauce over the top

name: French Toast
instructions: Whisk together eggs, milk, vanilla, and cinnamon in a shallow bowl
Heat butter in a skillet over medium heat
Dip bread slices in egg mixture, coating both sides
Cook until golden brown on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side
Serve hot with maple syrup and powdered sugar

name: Veggie Omelette
instructions: Whisk eggs with milk, salt, and pepper
Melt butter in a non-stick pan over medium heat
Add vegetables and sauté until softened
Pour egg mixture over vegetables
Cook until edges set, then sprinkle cheese on one half
Fold omelette in half and cook until cheese melts
Slide onto plate and serve

name: Breakfast Burrito
instructions: Scramble eggs in a pan and season with salt and pepper
Warm tortillas in a dry skillet
Heat black beans in a small pot
Layer scrambled eggs, beans, cheese, and avocado on each tortilla
Top with salsa and sour cream
Fold sides in and roll up tightly
Optionally grill the burrito seam-side down for a crispy exterior

name: Overnight Oats
instructions: Combine oats, milk, yogurt, chia seeds, honey, and vanilla in a jar
Stir well to combine
Cover and refrigerate overnight or at least 4 hours
In the morning, stir and add more milk if desired
Top with fresh fruit and nuts
Enjoy cold

name: Grilled Chicken Caesar Salad
instructions: Season chicken breasts with salt, pepper, and olive oil
Grill chicken over medium-high heat for 6-7 minutes per side
Let chicken rest for 5 minutes, then slice
Wash and chop romaine lettuce
Toss lettuce with Caesar dressing
Top with sliced chicken, croutons, and Parmesan
Serve with lemon wedges

name: Turkey Club Sandwich
instructions: Toast bread slices until golden
Spread mayonnaise on all three slices
On first slice, layer turkey and cheese
Add second slice of bread
Layer bacon, lettuce, and tomato
Season with salt and pepper
Top with third slice of bread
Cut diagonally and secure with toothpicks

name: Caprese Sandwich
instructions: Slice ciabatta roll in half horizontally
Drizzle both sides with olive oil
Layer mozzarella slices on bottom half
Add tomato slices
Season with salt and pepper
Add fresh basil leaves
Drizzle with balsamic glaze
Top with other half of roll and serve

name: Asian Chicken Lettuce Wraps
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Add ground chicken and cook until browned
Add garlic and ginger, cook for 1 minute
Stir in hoisin sauce, soy sauce, and rice vinegar
Add water chestnuts and cook for 2 minutes
Remove from heat and stir in green onions
Separate lettuce leaves and wash
Spoon chicken mixture into lettuce cups and serve

name: Quinoa Buddha Bowl
instructions: Cook quinoa in vegetable broth according to package directions
Toss sweet potato cubes with olive oil, salt, and pepper
Roast at 400F for 25 minutes
Drain and rinse chickpeas, season and roast for 20 minutes
Massage kale with a bit of olive oil
Make dressing by whisking tahini with lemon juice and water
Assemble bowls with quinoa, roasted vegetables, chickpeas, and kale
Top with sliced avocado and drizzle with tahini dressing

name: Tomato Basil Soup
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat
Add onion and cook until softened
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute
Add tomatoes and broth, bring to a boil
Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes
Add basil and blend until smooth using an immersion blender
Stir in heavy cream and season with salt and pepper
Serve hot with croutons

name: Greek Salad
instructions: Combine greens, cucumber, tomatoes, and onion in a large bowl
Add Kalamata olives and feta cheese
Whisk together olive oil, red wine vinegar, oregano, salt, and pepper
Drizzle dressing over salad
Toss gently to combine
Serve immediately

name: Beef Tacos
instructions: Brown ground beef in a skillet over medium-high heat
Drain excess fat
Add taco seasoning and water, stir to combine
Simmer for 5 minutes until thickened
Warm taco shells according to package directions
Fill shells with seasoned beef
Top with lettuce, cheese, tomato, sour cream, and salsa
Serve immediately

name: Grilled Salmon with Asparagus
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat
Brush salmon with olive oil and season with salt and pepper
Trim asparagus and toss with olive oil, garlic, salt, and pepper
Place salmon skin-side down on grill
Add asparagus to grill
Grill salmon for 4-5 minutes per side
Grill asparagus until tender, about 5-7 minutes
Garnish with fresh dill and lemon slices
Serve with lemon wedges

name: Spaghetti Carbonara
ingredients: Salt and black pepper to taste
instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions, reserve 1 cup pasta water
While pasta cooks, crisp pancetta in a large skillet
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute
In a bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese
Drain pasta and add to skillet with pancetta
Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture
Add pasta water as needed to create a creamy sauce
Season with salt and lots of black pepper
Garnish with parsley and extra Parmesan

name: Chicken Stir Fry
ingredients: 2 cups mixed vegetables (broccoli, bell peppers, carrots)
instructions: Toss chicken with cornstarch
Heat 1 tbsp oil in a wok over high heat
Stir-fry chicken until cooked through, set aside
Add remaining oil and stir-fry vegetables until tender-crisp
Add garlic and ginger, cook for 30 seconds
Return chicken to wok
Add soy sauce and oyster sauce, toss to combine
Garnish with sesame seeds
Serve over rice

name: Beef Stroganoff
instructions: Cook egg noodles according to package directions
Season beef with salt and pepper, sear in butter until browned
Remove beef and set aside
Sauté onions and mushrooms in the same pan
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute
Sprinkle flour over vegetables and stir
Gradually add beef broth, stirring constantly
Return beef to pan and simmer for 10 minutes
Remove from heat and stir in sour cream and mustard
Serve over egg noodles and garnish with parsley

name: Vegetarian Lasagna
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F
Cook lasagna noodles according to package directions
Sauté vegetables with garlic in olive oil until softened
Mix ricotta, egg, half the mozzarella, and half the Parmesan
Spread 1 cup marinara in bottom of 9x13 baking dish
Layer noodles, ricotta mixture, vegetables, and marinara
Repeat layers twice more
Top with remaining mozzarella and Parmesan
Cover with foil and bake for 30 minutes
Remove foil and bake 15 more minutes until golden
Let rest 10 minutes before serving

name: Honey Garlic Pork Chops
instructions: Season pork chops with salt and pepper
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Sear pork chops for 4-5 minutes per side until golden
Remove pork chops and set aside
In same skillet, add garlic and ginger, cook for 30 seconds
Add honey and soy sauce, stir to combine
Return pork chops to skillet and coat with sauce
Simmer for 2-3 minutes until sauce thickens
Garnish with green onions and serve

name: Shrimp Scampi
ingredients: 1 lb large shrimp, peeled and deveined
instructions: Cook linguine according to package directions
Heat olive oil and 2 tbsp butter in a large skillet
Add shrimp and cook until pink, about 2 minutes per side
Remove shrimp and set aside
Add garlic to skillet and cook for 1 minute
Add wine and lemon juice, simmer for 3 minutes
Stir in remaining butter until melted
Return shrimp to skillet and toss with sauce
Add drained pasta and toss to combine
Garnish with parsley and red pepper flakes

name: BBQ Ribs
ingredients: Salt and black pepper to taste
instructions: Remove membrane from back of ribs
Mix brown sugar, paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, cayenne, salt, and pepper
Rub spice mixture all over ribs
Wrap ribs in foil and refrigerate for 2 hours
Preheat oven to 275F
Place wrapped ribs on baking sheet and bake for 2.5 hours
Remove from oven and unwrap
Brush ribs generously with BBQ sauce
Broil for 5-7 minutes until sauce caramelizes
Let rest for 5 minutes before cutting

name: Chicken Parmesan
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F
Pound chicken breasts to even thickness
Season with salt and pepper
Dredge in flour, dip in egg, then coat with breadcrumbs
Heat olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet
Brown chicken on both sides, about 3 minutes per side
Top each breast with marinara sauce and cheeses
Transfer skillet to oven and bake for 20 minutes
Garnish with fresh basil and serve

name: Hummus and Veggie Plate
instructions: Spread hummus on a plate
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with paprika
Arrange vegetables around the hummus
Toast pita triangles if desired
Serve immediately

name: Caprese Skewers
instructions: Thread one tomato, one basil leaf, and one mozzarella ball onto each skewer
Arrange skewers on a serving plate
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic glaze
Season with salt and pepper
Serve immediately or refrigerate until ready to serve

name: Guacamole with Chips
instructions: Mash avocados in a bowl with lime juice
Add tomato, onion, cilantro, and jalapeno
Season with salt and cumin
Mix gently to combine
Taste and adjust seasoning
Serve immediately with tortilla chips

name: Spinach Artichoke Dip
instructions: Preheat oven to 350F
Mix cream cheese, sour cream, and mayonnaise until smooth
Stir in spinach, artichokes, garlic, and half of both cheeses
Season with salt and pepper
Transfer to a baking dish
Top with remaining cheese
Bake for 20-25 minutes until bubbly and golden
Serve hot with crackers or bread

name: Buffalo Chicken Wings
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F
Pat wings dry and season with salt, pepper, garlic powder, and paprika
Arrange wings on a baking sheet
Bake for 40-45 minutes, flipping halfway
Mix hot sauce with melted butter
Toss baked wings in sauce
Serve with ranch or blue cheese dressing and celery sticks

name: Cheese Quesadilla
ingredients: 1 cup shredded cheese (cheddar or Mexican blend)
instructions: Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat
Place one tortilla in the skillet
Sprinkle cheese, peppers, and onions over half the tortilla
Fold tortilla in half
Cook for 2-3 minutes until golden and crispy
Flip and cook other side for 2 minutes
Cut into triangles
Serve with sour cream, salsa, and guacamole

name: Bruschetta
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F
Arrange baguette slices on a baking sheet
Brush with olive oil and toast for 5-7 minutes
Mix tomatoes, basil, garlic, remaining olive oil, and balsamic vinegar
Season with salt and pepper
Top toasted bread with tomato mixture
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese
Serve immediately

name: Stuffed Mushrooms
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F
Remove stems from mushrooms and chop stems finely
Sauté chopped stems with garlic in olive oil
Mix sautéed stems with cream cheese, Parmesan, and parsley
Season with salt and pepper
Fill mushroom caps with mixture
Top with breadcrumbs
Bake for 20 minutes until golden
Serve hot

name: Deviled Eggs
instructions: Peel hard-boiled eggs and cut in half lengthwise
Remove yolks and place in a bowl
Mash yolks with a fork
Add mayonnaise, mustard, and vinegar
Mix until smooth
Season with salt and pepper
Pipe or spoon mixture back into egg whites
Garnish with paprika and chives
Refrigerate until serving

name: Nachos Supreme
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F
Spread chips on a large baking sheet
Sprinkle cheese evenly over chips
Add black beans, corn, and jalapeno slices
Bake for 10-12 minutes until cheese melts
Remove from oven
Top with dollops of sour cream, salsa, and guacamole
Garnish with cilantro
Serve with lime wedges

name: Chicken Tenders
instructions: Season chicken with salt, pepper, garlic powder, and paprika
Set up three bowls: flour, beaten eggs, and breadcrumbs
Dredge each tender in flour, dip in egg, then coat with breadcrumbs
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Fry tenders for 3-4 minutes per side until golden
Drain on paper towels
Serve hot with honey mustard and BBQ sauce

name: Mozzarella Sticks
instructions: Freeze cheese sticks for 30 minutes
Mix breadcrumbs with Italian seasoning and garlic powder
Dredge frozen cheese in flour, dip in egg, coat with breadcrumbs
Repeat egg and breadcrumb coating for double layer
Freeze coated sticks for 15 minutes
Heat oil to 350F
Fry sticks for 2-3 minutes until golden
Drain on paper towels
Serve immediately with marinara sauce

name: Pigs in a Blanket
ingredients: 24 mini hot dogs or cocktail sausages
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F
Unroll crescent dough and separate into triangles
Cut each triangle into 3 smaller triangles
Wrap each hot dog with a dough triangle
Place seam-side down on baking sheet
Brush with beaten egg
Sprinkle with sesame seeds if desired
Bake for 12-15 minutes until golden
Serve warm with mustard and ketchup

name: Fruit Salad
instructions: Combine all fruits in a large bowl
Mix honey and lime juice in a small bowl
Drizzle honey-lime mixture over fruit
Gently toss to combine
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes
Garnish with fresh mint before serving
Serve chilled

name: Energy Balls
instructions: Mix all ingredients in a bowl until well combined
Refrigerate for 30 minutes
Roll mixture into 1-inch balls
Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
Refrigerate for another hour until firm
Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator
Enjoy as needed for a quick energy boost

name: Popcorn Three Ways
ingredients: For butter: 3 tbsp melted butter, salt
For parmesan: 2 tbsp butter, 1/4 cup Parmesan, garlic powder
For caramel: 1/2 cup brown sugar, 1/4 cup butter, 2 tbsp corn syrup
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large pot over medium heat
Add popcorn kernels and cover
Shake pot occasionally until popping slows
For butter: toss with melted butter and salt
For parmesan: toss with butter, Parmesan, and garlic powder
For caramel: boil sugar, butter, and syrup for 2 minutes, then pour over popcorn
Serve immediately or store in airtight container

name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F
Mix flour, baking soda, and salt in a bowl
Cream butter and both sugars in another bowl
Beat in eggs and vanilla
Gradually stir in flour mixture
Fold in chocolate chips
Drop rounded tablespoons onto baking sheets
Bake 9-11 minutes until golden brown
Cool on baking sheet for 2 minutes
Transfer to wire rack to cool completely

name: Protein Smoothie
instructions: Add all ingredients to a blender
Blend on high until smooth
Taste and adjust sweetness with honey if needed
Pour into a glass
Serve immediately

name: Trail Mix
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a large bowl
Mix well to distribute evenly
Store in an airtight container
Portion into small bags for grab-and-go snacks
Keeps for up to 2 weeks at room temperature
